description:
Deadline reminder app for subscriptions, insurance, visas and more


What's New
- Group messaging
- Customize your profile avatar
- AI auto-detects deadlines from photos
- AI settings: on-device AI and preferred AI provider selection
- Public schedule packs: create and share schedule collections anyone can subscribe to
- Easy mode expansion
- Bug fixes and performance improvements
Full Changelog: due2-cli-v0.9.0...due2-v2.6.0
